name: MUSCULOTENDINOUS INJURY

demographics.Path: periosteal stripping with hematoma at tendon attachment site

distribution: feathery appearance of diffuse muscle edema
discriminating_features: feathery appearance of diffuse muscle edema
deep intramuscular hematoma (with severe trauma resulting in disruption of muscle fibers):
high SI on T1WI (= T1 shortening of methemoglobin)

general: feathery appearance of diffuse muscle edema
deep intramuscular hematoma (with severe trauma resulting in disruption of muscle fibers):
high SI on T1WI (= T1 shortening of methemoglobin)
low SI on T2WI (= T2 shortening of hemosiderin)
waviness + retraction of the torn end of tendon with fragment of bone / cartilage
